text: Using Claude Code with various Al providers Create various settingsfil | have one fil for each provider,alin ~/claude « KIMI K2.5: Kimi_settings json i T8 “ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL": "htps://api.moonshot .ai/anthropic” “ATHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "YOURKAPTEYHERE'", “APL_TIMEOUT_S": "3000000", “ATFROPIC_WODEL": "Kini-k2.5", “ANTHROPIC_SWALL_FAST_WODEL: "Kini-k2.5", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SORNET_MODEL": "kini-k2.5", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS MODEL": "Kini-Kz.5", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HATKU_NODEL": "kinick2.S", "CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL'": "Kini-k2.5" ) ) + MiniMax M2.1: minimax_settings.json i “envs “ATHROPIC_BASE_URL": "https://api.nininax. io/anthropic”, “ANTHROPIC AUTH_TOKEN": “YOUAPIKEYHERE “APLTIMEOUT_S": "3000000", “CLATDE CODE_DTSABLE NONESSENTIAL TRAFFIC": 1, “ANTHROPIC_WODEL": "Miniax-H2.1", “ANTHROPIC_SHALL_FAST_MODEL": “MiniMax-H2.1", “ATHROPIC_DEFAULT_SOWET_HODEL": "Miniax-H2.1", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT OPUS MODEL": “Miniax-H2.1", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HATKU_NODEL": “MiniNox-Hz. 1" » ) + ZAIGLMA7: 7a_setings json « menvs ¢ “ATHROPIC_BASE_URL": "https://ap1.2.ai/api/anthropic®, “ATHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN": "YOURPIKEYHERE" “APL_TIMEOUT_HS": "3000000", “CLAUDE CODE_DISABLE NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC": 1, “ANTIROPIC_HODEL": "gla-4.7", “ANTHROPIC_SHALL_FAST_MODEL": “gln-4.7", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SOWET_WODEL": "gln-4.7", “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT OPUS MODEL": “gln-—4.7, “ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL": “gla-4.7+ ) ) Start Claude using provider you want + SonnetOpus: claude « kimi: claude —settings ~/.claude/kini-settings. json + minimax: claude —settings ~/.claude/niniaax-settings. json « 28kt claude —settings ~/.claude/zai-settings. json
